div.head: The Ambassador in Brazil (Morgan) to the Secretary of State

opener.dateline:
Rio de Janeiro, October 22, 1920—5 p.m.
[Received 11:15 p.m.]

div.p: 101. Dept’s Oct. 21, 6 p.m. President Pessoa assured me this morning that he would be greatly honored by visit of Sec’y of State in November next, in return for Pessoa’s visit to United States last year. Will consider the matter confidential until announcement is made from Washington.
Pessoa would be gratified if Secretary should arrive November 15th, thus come [on] Brazil’s national fête day.
